a.answer_text: A true duplicate is two charges with the same amount and order number. Refund the later one from Billing -> Transactions; it reaches the customer in 5-10 business days.

b.answer_text: A true duplicate is two charges with the same amount and order number. Refund the later one from Billing -> Transactions; it reaches the customer in 5-10 business days.

a.answer_text: The tracking number appears on the order under Orders -> Fulfillment once the carrier accepts the package.

b.answer_text: The tracking number appears on the order under Orders -> Fulfillment once the carrier accepts the package.

a.answer_text: The reset link is valid for one hour. Confirm the email on the account and check that your mail server is not blocking our sending domain; a reset also clears a locked account.

b.answer_text: The reset link is valid for one hour. Confirm the email on the account and check that your mail server is not blocking our sending domain; a reset also clears a locked account.

a.answer_text: Downgrading does not delete your order history. It takes effect at the start of your next billing cycle and reduces your monthly order allowance and plan-specific features.

b.answer_text: Downgrading does not delete your order history. It takes effect at the start of your next billing cycle and reduces your monthly order allowance and plan-specific features.

a.answer_text: ERR-402 is a payment declined by the issuer, not a CloudCart outage. The store cannot override an issuer decline; the customer should use a different card or contact their bank.

b.answer_text: ERR-402 means the customer's bank declined the payment, not a problem with your store. You cannot override a bank decline; the customer should try another card or call their bank.

verdict.rationale: same content, equally clear despite the broken-English question

a.answer_text: If there has been no scan beyond the carrier's window, open a trace with the carrier using the tracking number. CloudCart cannot move a package the carrier already has.

b.answer_text: I understand the frustration. If there has been no scan beyond the carrier's window, open a trace with the carrier using the tracking number. CloudCart cannot move a package the carrier already has, but I will help you escalate it.

verdict.rationale: same fix, with more acknowledgement of the anger — quality unchanged
